ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip flag on this card.

trivia_bullets.text: Expel the Unworthy is a common Sorcery from Modern Horizons 3, released June 14, 2024. MH3 is a draft-innovation set that injects cards directly into Modern without passing through Standard. The set returned over 70 keyword abilities and mechanics including Kicker, which appears on this card.
sources: Wizards of the Coast mechanics article for Modern Horizons 3

trivia_bullets.text: The card's kicker structure creates a scalable exile spell: base mode (1W) targets only creatures with mana value 3 or less; kicked mode (additional 2W) targets any creature. The controller of the exiled creature gains life equal to its mana value in either case, functioning as a consolation clause that softens the political cost in multiplayer.

Expel the Unworthy carries an EDHREC rank of 22,207, indicating low Commander adoption. Its sorcery speed is the primary limiting factor: white has access to more efficiently-costed exile at sorcery speed, and the life-gain rider does not offset the tempo disadvantage for competitive play. Legal in Modern, Pauper, Legacy, and Commander.
The card was previewed on May 27, 2024 by Marshall Sutcliffe, longtime co-host of the Limited Resources podcast and former Wizards content creator.
sources: Scryfall API: preview source and source_uri fields

related_cards.name: Path to Exile
related_cards.note: Canonical white exile benchmark; Expel is commonly measured against it

related_cards.name: Prismatic Ending
related_cards.note: MH-series white exile with flexible targeting; competitive bar in the Modern context

related_cards.name: Journey to Nowhere
related_cards.note: Budget Pauper-legal white removal for comparison in the Pauper context where Expel is also legal
